title: Design System: Aman Kumar Jha — Portfolio

shadows.name: standard
shadows.purpose: Solid card drop shadow at rest.

shadows.name: hover
shadows.purpose: Increased drop shadow during hover state.

components.name: Neobrutalist Card
components.description: Standard content container card with thick black borders and flat offset drop shadow.
components.html:
Category

This is some sample text describing the technical capability inside the card.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #ffffff; border: 3px solid #1a1a1a; box-shadow: 5px 5px 0px #1a1a1a; border-radius: 4px; padding: 24px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; transition: transform 0.15s, box-shadow 0.15s; cursor: default; } .ds-card:hover { transform: translate(-3px, -3px); box-shadow: 8px 8px 0px #1a1a1a; } .ds-card-top { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 12px; } .ds-card-cat { font-size: 10px; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.06em; padding: 3px 10px; border: 2px solid #1a1a1a; border-radius: 999px; color: #111; background: #FF6B9D; } .ds-card-text { font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.7; color: #555; margin: 0; }

narrative.overview: A high-contrast, technical retro design system that leverages thick borders, heavy black ink, solid flat offsets, and a warm cardstock background to create a physical, tactile digital interface.
keyCharacteristics: Saturated color pops for action tags and categories

rules.name: The Contrast Rule
rules.body: Body text must always be absolute #1a1a1a on white cards, and all accent tags must maintain clear black-on-color contrast.

dos: Do keep headings short, punchy, and balanced using Bebas Neue.
Do use saturated accent borders to distinguish different expertise categories.
Do ensure all text uses #1a1a1a for maximum readability.
donts: Don't use smooth gradient text or glassmorphic blur effects.
Don't use side-stripe borders inside container cards; use full borders instead.
Don't allow cards to stay at zero opacity on load; ensure all transitions animate immediately to 1.
